en.settings.title: M2_APEX Settings
en.settings.quickSwitch: Quick Switch: type in File Explorer to jump to a file
en.settings.foreignInput: Ignore keys sent from another PC (Synergy / KVM / remote)
en.settings.filesFirst: Prioritise files and folders over apps
en.settings.priority: Location priority — one per line, top = highest (e.g. Desktop, C:\, D:\):
en.settings.searchLinksHint: Pin apps, folders, network shares or URLs to the top of the search list. In Arguments, use {path} to pass the folder focused when search opened (e.g. the front Explorer window).
en.settings.searchLinkAdminHint: Run this quick pick as administrator
en.settings.cleanHistoryHint: Clears the recent / frequent items shown at the top of search.
en.settings.drives: Indexed drives (one per line, blank = all fixed drives):
en.settings.startupNotRegistered: Not registered — M2_APEX won't launch at startup.
en.settings.startupThis: This is the copy you're running now.
en.settings.startupOther: This is a DIFFERENT copy from the one running now (current: {0}).
en.settings.startupMissing: That registered file no longer exists.
en.settings.clearDebugLogConfirm:
Delete all files in the DEBUG_LOG folder (crash, performance, system, search, index and hotkey logs)?

This clears old entries so you can reproduce an issue from a clean slate, and works even while the app is running. It cannot be undone.
en.settings.clearDebugLogDone: The debug log folder has been cleared.
en.settings.hotkeyLogHint: When on, records every double-Ctrl decision — the gap between taps, whether a key pressed mid-hold cancelled it, and foreign/injected input that was ignored — together with the focused app, to hotkey.log. Best for diagnosing a double-Ctrl that does not open the search bar. Tip: if the log stays empty while one specific app (e.g. VS Code) is focused, that app is running as administrator and a non-elevated M2_APEX cannot see its keystrokes — run M2_APEX as administrator too, or start that app without elevation.
en.settings.performanceLogHint: When on, M2_APEX records how long startup and each search activation take, saved to performance.log in the debug log folder — handy for diagnosing a slow first launch after a reboot. Double-Ctrl tap timings now go to hotkey.log.
en.settings.systemLogHint: When on, records a one-time snapshot at launch (Windows version, CPU, RAM, power source, and how long the PC had been booted) plus sleep/resume events — useful for explaining why the first activation after a reboot or wake can be slow. Written once, so it does not affect performance.
en.settings.searchLogHint: When on, records each search's query, result count and elapsed time to search.log. The search runs on a background thread and the write is off-loaded, so this does not slow typing.
en.settings.indexLogHint: When on, records how long scanning each drive takes and how many items it adds, to index.log. Only written while the index is (re)built, off the UI thread — useful for spotting a slow drive that delays indexing.
en.settings.debugFilesHint: The DEBUG_LOG folder collects: crash.log (crashes — always on, only written if the app crashes), performance.log, system.log, search.log, index.log and hotkey.log (each only when ticked above). Use Clear debug log to empty the folder before reproducing an issue — it works even while the app is running.
en.settings.factoryResetHint: Reset all settings (including M2 Commander) and clear the cache, then restart.
en.settings.factoryResetConfirm:
Reset ALL settings (including M2 Commander) and clear the cache to factory defaults?

M2_APEX will restart.

en.commander.fastDelConfirmMany: Permanently fast-delete these {0} folders and everything inside them? This cannot be undone.

en.commander.copiedMarkMany: Marked {0} items — press Ctrl+V to paste them here

en.commander.bc.notFound: Beyond Compare not found. Add it as a custom command (F11) or install it.

zh-TW.settings.title: M2_APEX 設定
zh-TW.settings.quickSwitch: Quick Switch:在檔案總管打字即可跳到檔案
zh-TW.settings.foreignInput: 忽略來自其他電腦的按鍵(Synergy / KVM / 遠端)
zh-TW.settings.doubleCtrlGap: 雙擊 Ctrl 最大間隔(毫秒):
zh-TW.settings.filesFirst: 檔案與資料夾優先於應用程式
zh-TW.settings.webUrl: 網頁搜尋 URL({0} = 關鍵字):
zh-TW.settings.priority: 位置優先順序 — 每行一個,越上面越優先(例如 Desktop、C:\、D:\):
zh-TW.settings.searchLinksHint: 將 App、資料夾、網路位置或網址釘選在搜尋清單最前面。在「參數」使用 {path} 可帶入開啟搜尋時焦點所在的資料夾（例如最前面的檔案總管視窗）。
zh-TW.settings.searchLinkAdminHint: 以系統管理員身分執行此快速選取
zh-TW.settings.cleanHistoryHint: 清除顯示在搜尋最前方的最近／常用項目。
zh-TW.settings.drives: 索引磁碟(每行一個,留空 = 所有固定磁碟):
zh-TW.settings.excluded: 排除的資料夾名稱(每行一個):
zh-TW.settings.startupNotRegistered: 未註冊 — M2_APEX 不會在開機時啟動。
zh-TW.settings.startupThis: 就是目前執行中的這一份。
zh-TW.settings.startupOther: 與目前執行中的不是同一份（目前：{0}）。
zh-TW.settings.clearDebugLogConfirm:
要刪除 DEBUG_LOG 資料夾內的所有檔案嗎？（crash、performance、system、search、index、hotkey 各記錄）

這會清掉舊記錄，讓你在乾淨狀態下重現問題，而且即使程式執行中也能清除。此動作無法復原。
zh-TW.settings.clearDebugLogDone: 除錯記錄資料夾已清空。
zh-TW.settings.hotkeyLog: 記錄雙擊 Ctrl 熱鍵判定
zh-TW.settings.hotkeyLogHint: 勾選後，把每次雙擊 Ctrl 的判定寫入 hotkey.log：兩次間隔、是否因按住期間按了別的鍵而取消、被忽略的外來／注入輸入，並附上當時聚焦的程式。最適合診斷雙擊 Ctrl 叫不出搜尋列的問題。提醒：若在某個程式（例如 VS Code）聚焦時完全沒有任何記錄，代表該程式以系統管理員身分執行，未提權的 M2_APEX 看不到它的按鍵——請同樣以系統管理員身分執行 M2_APEX，或改用非提權方式啟動該程式。
zh-TW.settings.performanceLogHint: 勾選後，M2_APEX 會把啟動流程、每次喚出搜尋列的耗時寫入除錯記錄資料夾中的 performance.log，方便診斷重開機後第一次喚出很慢的問題。雙擊 Ctrl 的間隔記錄已改寫到 hotkey.log。
zh-TW.settings.systemLogHint: 勾選後，啟動時記錄一次系統快照（Windows 版本、CPU、RAM、電源來源，以及開機後經過多久）與睡眠／唤醒事件，用來解釋重開機或唤醒後第一次唥出為何較慢。只在啟動時寫一次，不影響效能。
zh-TW.settings.searchLogHint: 勾選後，把每次搜尋的關鍵字、結果數與耗時寫入 search.log。搜尋在背景執行緒進行、寫檔也非同步，因此不會拖慢打字。
zh-TW.settings.indexLogHint: 勾選後，把每個磁碟掃描花多久、掃到幾筆寫入 index.log。只在重建索引時、於背景執行緒寫入，方便找出拖慢索引的磁碟。
zh-TW.settings.debugFilesHint: DEBUG_LOG 資料夾會收集：crash.log（當機記錄，一律啟用，只有程式當掉時才寫入）、performance.log、system.log、search.log、index.log、hotkey.log（各自需在上方勾選才會記錄）。重現問題前可先按「清除除錯記錄」清空資料夾，即使程式執行中也能清除。
zh-TW.settings.factoryResetHint: 將所有設定（含 M2 Commander）與快取還原為預設值，然後重新啟動。
zh-TW.settings.factoryResetConfirm:
確定要將所有設定（含 M2 Commander）與快取還原為原廠預設值嗎？

M2_APEX 將會重新啟動。
